src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/enti.general_idea: Implement equals, hashCode, and toString methods for the Provider entity to ensure correct object comparison and debugging output.
src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/enti.human_impl: Added @Override methods for equals, hashCode, and toString using java.util.Objects.

src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/exce.general_idea: Add a specific exception handler for FileException to return a BAD_REQUEST response with a descriptive error message.
Add a specific exception handler for IllegalDatabaseOperation to return a BAD_REQUEST response with a descriptive error message.
Add a catch-all exception handler for IOException, CsvException, and IllegalAccessException to return an I_AM_A_TEAPOT response.
src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/exce.human_impl: @ExceptionHandler({IOException.class, CsvException.class, IllegalAccessException.class}) protected ResponseEntity<Object> handleOtherExceptions(Exception ex) { ... }

src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/exce.general_idea: Import CsvException to support the new catch-all exception handler.
Import IOException to support the new catch-all exception handler.

src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/repo.general_idea: Add a repository method to retrieve all providers sorted by name to support API sorting requirements.
Import java.util.List to support the return type of the new repository method.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency to version 1.18.40 for compatibility with newer JDKs.
Remove explicit version from jackson-dataformat-xml to inherit from Spring Boot BOM.
Add ModelMapper library for object mapping.
Set resource encoding for the Maven WAR plugin to ensure correct character handling.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to pass file encoding arguments to the JVM during tests.

src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.general_idea: Remove Kafka log appenders and their associated configuration properties.
Remove RollingFile appenders for general, error, and debug logs.
src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.human_impl: Removed <RollingFile> definitions for LogFile, ErrorFile, and DebugFile.

src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.general_idea: Remove properties related to file logging paths and rotation policies.
src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.human_impl: Removed <Properties> block containing logBaseDir, sizeTriggerPolicy, etc.

src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.general_idea: Update the specific logger name to match the new package structure.
Remove references to removed appenders from the logger configuration.
src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.human_impl: Removed AppenderRef for kafkaErrorLogAppender, kafkaInfoLogAppender, DebugFile, LogFile, and ErrorFile.

src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.general_idea: Adjust the console output pattern style for better visibility.
src/main/resources/log4j2-all.xml.human_impl: Changed class name style from 'dark,yellow' to 'black,yellow' in Console PatternLayout.
